query: SELECT id, away_team, home_team, away_book_spread, home_book_spread, away_spread_odds, home_spread_odds, away_ml_odds, home_ml_odds, model_away_puck_line, model_home_puck_line FROM games WHERE (away_team = 'STL' OR home_team = 'STL') AND sport = 'nhl' LIMIT 5;
